channel.title: Pages on LU Junsong
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on LU Junsong

item.title: About
item.description: Education The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, China (2018.9 - 2020.7) M.S. in Applied Psychology, GPA: 3.864 (rank: 1/27) Advisor: Prof. WANG Xiaotian Highlights: Outstanding Graduate 2020 Academic Excellence Award 2020 Academic Scholarship Gold Award 2019 Northeastern University, China (2014.10 - 2018.6) B.S. in Metallurgy, GPA: 3.511 (rank: 36/255) Advisor: Prof. MENG Xiangning Highlights: Postgraduate Recommendation Published two mathematical modeling patents; one was sold at a price of 150,000RMB Academic Scholarship Award (Class C) 2015, 2016, 2017 Work Experience Research Assistant: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (2020.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Education and Work Experience Research Assistant: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (2020.7 - ) My interests include dual-inheritance theory, evolutionary biology/psychology/anthropology, decision-making, psychometrics, motivation, scientometrics, causal inference, social network analysis, and meta-analysis. Beyond my academic interests, I also like reading statistics, philosophy, complexity. Master of Science in Applied Psychology, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (2018.9 - 2020.7) Outstanding Graduate 2020
